description: CREBEAU Placenta Pearl Essence Mask is a brightening sheet mask saturated with plant-based placenta extract, pearl extract, and peptides that work synergistically to hydrate, improve skin radiance, and support elasticity. The essence base delivers concentrated nourishment in a single 15-20 minute application, leaving the complexion visibly smoother and more luminous.
protocol: Apply to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave in place for 15-20 minutes. Remove the sheet and massage residual essence into the face, neck, and decollete until fully absorbed. Use 1-3 times per week as a stand-alone treatment or after in-clinic procedures.

description: SPIDER TOXIN PROGRAM is a dual-step topical system combining a smoothing toxin serum with a bio micro-needle serum to optimize ingredient penetration and surface texture refinement. The toxin serum works to relax facial expression lines while the dissolvable micro-needle serum delivers active ingredients into the upper dermis for deep hydration and visible firming.
protocol: Cleanse the skin thoroughly, then apply the toxin serum evenly across target zones and allow to absorb. Layer the micro-needle serum onto priority wrinkle areas and press gently to activate the dissolving needles. Use the toxin serum daily and the micro-needle serum 2-3 times per week for cumulative results.

description: Rejuran Healer Calming Lip Balm is formulated with c-PDRN (Polynucleotide) derived from salmon DNA and nourishing shea butter, providing cellular repair support alongside long-lasting moisture retention for delicate lip tissue. The lightweight texture absorbs without stickiness, making it suitable for daily use and as a post-procedure lip comfort product.
protocol: Apply a thin even layer to clean, dry lips as needed throughout the day, after eating, or immediately following in-clinic lip filler or laser treatments. Reapply generously at bedtime for overnight conditioning. No rinsing required.

description: Vanhalla BLEMISH Tranexamic Acid 3 Serum delivers 3% tranexamic acid alongside niacinamide and botanical brightening agents to inhibit melanin transfer, reduce post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and visibly even skin tone over consistent daily use. The lightweight 30 mL formula is suitable for blemish-prone complexions and areas of persistent discoloration.
protocol: Dispense 3-4 drops onto cleansed skin morning and evening, pressing gently across hyperpigmented zones and the full face. Follow immediately with moisturizer and, during daytime use, always apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen as tranexamic acid increases photosensitivity. Visible results are typically observed after 4-8 weeks of consistent use.

description: Vanhalla NIACINAMIDE Skin Tone Balance Serum contains a concentrated niacinamide (vitamin B3) complex that inhibits melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, minimizes enlarged pores, and regulates sebum production for a refined, even complexion. The 30 mL formula is well-tolerated across combination, oily, and blemish-prone skin types.
protocol: Apply 3-4 drops to cleansed skin morning and evening before moisturizer, focusing on pore-enlarged and uneven-tone areas. During morning application, follow with broad-spectrum sunscreen. Niacinamide can be layered with other actives including vitamin C and hyaluronic acid without interference.

description: Vanhalla ETINOL 3R Serum combines pure retinol with plant-derived bakuchiol and a multi-peptide complex in a vegan formulation designed to support collagen synthesis, smooth fine lines, and improve skin firmness over time. Bakuchiol modulates retinol-like receptor pathways and enhances tolerability, making the formula suitable for reactive skin types seeking gradual slow-aging benefits.
protocol: Apply a pea-sized amount to cleansed skin in the evening only, beginning with 2-3 applications per week and gradually increasing to nightly use as tolerance is established over 4-6 weeks. Always apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen in the morning throughout the treatment course.

description: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Essence in Toner is a 2-in-1 formula combining ceramide NP and panthenol for barrier repair with a multi-weight hyaluronic acid complex (sodium hyaluronate and hydrolyzed HA) for layered hydration. Niacinamide, vitamin C, and allantoin further support tone uniformity, soothing, and gentle surface renewal.
protocol: Apply to freshly cleansed skin morning and evening using a cotton pad or by gently pressing with the palms before subsequent serum and cream steps. For enhanced hydration, layer 2-3 times in succession using the 7-skin method before heavier skincare steps.

description: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Serum in Cream is a 2-in-1 moisturizer delivering ceramide NP for barrier restoration alongside a triple-weight hyaluronic acid complex (hyaluronic acid, sodium hyaluronate, and hydrolyzed HA) for multi-depth hydration retention. Glycerin, tocopherol (vitamin E), and allantoin provide antioxidant protection and skin-conditioning softness.
protocol: Apply an even layer to cleansed skin morning and evening as the final moisturizing step in the routine. Massage gently in upward strokes across the face and neck until absorbed, and reapply a small amount to particularly dry zones as needed throughout the day.

description: Vanhalla CICA CALM MIST TONER features 6% enhanced centella asiatica extract as its primary active, delivering concentrated madecassoside and asiaticoside to calm redness, support barrier integrity, and gently exfoliate sensitized skin. The fragrance-free, colorant-free, vegan formula is dispensed as a fine mist for even distribution over reactive or compromised complexions.
protocol: Mist evenly over cleansed skin at 15-20 cm distance as the first step of morning and evening routines, then press the mist into the skin with clean palms. Reapply throughout the day to refresh hydration and soothe environmental irritation. Suitable for use immediately post-procedure to calm treated skin.

description: SOONSU AQUA CREAM is a post-procedure recovery cream formulated with ceramide and skin-conditioning actives to restore the moisture barrier and balance the oil-to-hydration ratio following MTS, laser, or microneedling treatments. The fast-absorbing, non-occlusive texture provides a silky, comfortable finish without interfering with skin healing.
protocol: Apply an even layer to cleansed skin immediately following in-clinic procedures or twice daily during the post-procedure recovery period. Gently press into the treated area without rubbing and reapply on particularly dehydrated zones as needed to support barrier restoration.

description: Skin Marker Pen (White) is a precision-tip surgical-style skin marking tool with a white pigment formulated for clear visibility across all skin tones, including medium to deep complexions where conventional blue or black markers may be difficult to see. The sterile-format tip enables accurate placement mapping for needle-based, microneedling, filler, and cosmetic tattoo procedures.
protocol: Mark target injection points, symmetry lines, and anatomical reference guides on cleansed, dry skin prior to the procedure. Complete all markings before commencing treatment and wipe residual pigment clean with an appropriate skin cleanser or 70% isopropyl alcohol wipe after the procedure.

description: This hybrid gel sheet mask is formulated with a hydrating essence base that adheres closely to the skin contours, enabling even distribution of conditioning and moisturizing ingredients throughout the wear period. The soft gel texture supports comfortable application across facial skin and maintains contact without displacement during treatment.
protocol: Apply the mask to freshly cleansed skin, smooth firmly to remove air pockets, and leave in place for the duration indicated on the packaging (typically 20-30 minutes). Remove and gently pat remaining essence into the skin using clean fingertips until fully absorbed.

description: OPACIOUS COLLAGEN MASK is an overnight sleeping mask delivering a collagen-rich ampoule-grade essence that gradually melts into the skin during sleep, providing extended exposure to collagen peptides, hydrating actives, and surface-smoothing agents. The concentrated single-use format functions as an intensive weekly treatment rather than a daily rinse-off mask.
protocol: Apply a generous, even layer as the absolute final step of the evening skincare routine after all serums and moisturizers. Leave on overnight without rinsing. In the morning, rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water to remove residue. Use 1-2 times per week for optimal reconditioning results.

description: INVU REPARATIVE BB is a triple-functional BB cream combining SPF50+ PA++++ sun protection with a CICA Complex (madecassoside, asiaticoside) for barrier soothing, niacinamide and adenosine for brightening and wrinkle care, multi-weight hyaluronic acid for hydration, and three types of collagen for elasticity support. The formula provides natural, sheer tone-up coverage with a smooth non-sticky finish suitable for sensitive, dry, oily, or post-procedure skin.
protocol: Apply an even layer over the final morning skincare step, blending outward from the center of the face toward the jawline and hairline. Do not apply to open wounds or immediately post-ablative procedures. Reapply every 2-3 hours during prolonged sun exposure to maintain SPF50+ protection.

description: REPIDA BODY TONE-UP RADIANCE SERUM combines EGF (epidermal growth factor) and PDRN to support skin cell renewal and collagen synthesis on body skin, paired with niacinamide for melanin inhibition, multi-weight hyaluronic acid for hydration, adenosine for elasticity, and fermented botanical extracts for soothing and brightening. The waterproof soft cream texture absorbs quickly without greasiness, delivering simultaneous tone-up and daily UV defense on arms, underarms, legs, and decollete.
protocol: Dispense an appropriate amount onto clean body skin after bathing or showering and massage evenly in circular motions until fully absorbed. During daytime wear on exposed areas, layer with a broad-spectrum SPF sunscreen for additional protection. Use daily for cumulative brightening and firming effects.

description: REPIDA AZULENE H9 DERMA PLUS BOOSTER CREAM is formulated with natural azulene at 1,000 ppm as a primary anti-inflammatory agent, supported by 9 types of hyaluronic acid for multi-depth hydration, 9 types of collagen for elasticity, 8 peptides for firming and renewal, niacinamide for brightness, and botanical extracts including centella asiatica. The naturally purple formula is designed as a booster step to calm irritation and prime the skin to enhance absorption of subsequent skincare products.
protocol: Apply an even layer to cleansed skin as the first booster step before serum and cream, morning and evening. Press gently with palms to activate absorption and allow 30-60 seconds for the formula to fully penetrate before layering additional products. Particularly suited for use after in-clinic treatments to calm immediate post-procedure redness.

description: G2 OIL LIFTING PACK combines a G2 Fermented Complex of garlic and ginger extracts with peptides, ceramides, and multi-weight hyaluronic acids in an all-in-one mask-cream format designed to deliver immediate tightening alongside deep hydration. The fermented botanical actives support skin regeneration and improve firmness and elasticity while the mask phase creates a temporary lifting effect upon application.
protocol: Apply a generous even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave on for 15-20 minutes as a mask treatment. Tissue off the excess or massage the remaining cream gently into the face in upward lifting motions until absorbed. Use 2-3 times per week as an intensive treatment or as directed.

description: WHEAT GERM AMPOULE is a lightweight daily soothing ampoule featuring a patented wheat germ extract as its signature anti-inflammatory active, supported by multiple botanical extracts to calm redness, strengthen the skin barrier, and reduce sensitivity. The formula is specifically developed for breakout-prone and reactive skin types, helping to suppress irritation triggers while maintaining a fresh, non-sticky finish.
protocol: Apply 3-4 drops to cleansed skin morning and evening before moisturizer, pressing gently across the face with clean palms. Allow 30-60 seconds for full absorption before layering subsequent skincare steps. Can be applied directly to inflamed breakout zones as a localized calming treatment.

description: EU.MEI SUN ESSENCE provides SPF50+ PA++++ broad-spectrum protection in a 75% moisture essence base enriched with wheat germ-derived actives that calm UV-induced irritation and support barrier integrity alongside photoprotection. The formula is developed for sensitive and reactive skin types, offering reliable sun protection without white cast, fragrance, or heavy residue.
protocol: Apply as the absolute final step of the morning skincare routine, spreading an even layer across the face and neck with gentle upward strokes. Reapply every 2 hours during continuous outdoor exposure or after sweating or towelling. For adequate SPF, apply at minimum 0.5 mL (approximately one finger length) to the face and neck.

description: EU.MEI YOUTH FIRMING EYE CREAM combines high- and low-molecular-weight hyaluronic acid for layered hydration with glycine saponin for microcirculation support and wheat germ-derived actives to improve firmness, reduce puffiness, and diminish the appearance of dark circles around the fragile periorbital skin. The fragrance-free, fast-absorbing formula targets wrinkles, smile lines, and localized neck fine lines simultaneously.
protocol: Using the ring finger, gently tap a rice-grain sized amount around the orbital bone following the bone's contour (not directly on the eyelid skin) morning and evening. Avoid dragging the tissue and never apply closer than 5 mm to the inner mucous membrane. Allow full absorption before applying concealer or eye makeup.

description: WHEAT GERM COLLAGEN SKIN CARE SET is a complete 3-step routine combining a toner (120 mL), lotion (120 mL), and cream (50 g), each formulated with 2.5x-purity hydrolyzed collagen and wheat germ extract to improve moisture retention for up to 24 hours, restore skin elasticity, and reinforce a weakened barrier. The micro-collagen particle size enables fast absorption without heaviness, making the set suitable for dry and sensitive skin seeking daily deep hydration.
protocol: Use in sequence morning and evening on cleansed skin: first apply the toner with a cotton pad or hands to balance hydration, then layer the lotion for mid-level moisture, and finish with the cream to seal and protect the routine. The complete 3-step sequence is free of 7 designated harmful ingredients and safe for daily use.

description: KLARGEN LactoBath is a gentle feminine intimate cleanser formulated with lactic acid to maintain an acidic pH (3.8-4.5) in the vulvar microenvironment, paired with Lactobacillus ferment extract to support a healthy microbial balance and centella asiatica extract to calm irritated or sensitized skin. Vitamin C provides antioxidant support while the mild cleansing base removes odor-causing bacteria without disrupting the delicate intimate tissue.
protocol: Dispense a small amount onto clean hands, lather gently across the external vulvar area only (do not apply internally), and rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water until completely clean. Use once or twice daily as a routine hygiene step. Avoid contact with eyes and rinse immediately if irritation occurs.

description: KLARGEN soln. is a portable 50 mL feminine intimate cleanser formulated with lactic acid for pH maintenance, Lactobacillus ferment extract for microbial balance support, centella asiatica extract for soothing, and vitamin C alongside botanical extracts for antioxidant and comfort benefits. The compact travel-friendly format delivers the same clinically supported intimate hygiene care as the full-size product in a convenient on-the-go bottle.
protocol: Apply a small amount to the external intimate area, create a light lather between clean hands, and rinse thoroughly with water until completely clean. Use once or twice daily or as needed during travel. Do not apply internally, and discontinue use if persistent irritation or discomfort develops.

description: ASCE+ IRLV is a lyophilized exosome-based formulation containing 20 mg of highly purified exosome powder per vial, designed for intimate area rejuvenation targeting vaginal dryness, decreased lubrication, and loss of tissue elasticity in the vulvovaginal region. Upon reconstitution with the supplied 2.5 mL diluent, the exosomes deliver signaling molecules that stimulate fibroblast activity, collagen synthesis, and tissue hydration at the cellular level.
protocol: Reconstitute the lyophilized powder with the full 2.5 mL diluent and mix gently until fully dissolved. Administer topically to the external intimate area using a cotton-tipped applicator or equivalent device, 1-2 times daily; avoid direct mucosal injection unless specifically indicated by a supervising physician. Treatment cycles of 4-8 weeks are typically recommended.

description: P198 RECORE INNER GEL contains PSC1994-EXPG™ Panax ginseng-derived exosomes alongside lactic acid for pH maintenance, multi-weight hyaluronic acid for tissue hydration, and peptides to support elasticity and intimate skin renewal. The single-use prefilled applicators deliver 2.5 g of gel per application directly to the V-zone, combining exosome-mediated cellular signalling with microbiome-supportive and moisturizing actives.
protocol: Use one single-use applicator per session following the directions printed on the packaging. Insert gently and deposit the gel as indicated, then discard the applicator hygienically after a single use. Use 3-4 times per week initially, reducing to a maintenance frequency of 1-2 times weekly as directed by the treating practitioner.

description: VELATOX GF11 is a professional skin booster containing 11 distinct cell growth factors (including EGF, FGF, and IGF variants) combined with antioxidant vitamins and anti-pigmentation and moisturizing components across 3 mL vials. The multi-growth-factor complex supports keratinocyte and fibroblast proliferation, accelerates collagen remodelling, and improves skin elasticity and tone uniformity.
protocol: Administer 3 mL per session via 30G mesotherapy injections into the upper to mid-dermis at 1-2 mm depth, using a multi-puncture or nappage technique across the treatment area. A series of 4-6 sessions spaced 2-4 weeks apart is recommended; maintenance sessions every 3-6 months. Provided as ready-to-use solution requiring no reconstitution.

description: VELASH SHGF11 is a scalp-specific ampoule delivering 11 cell growth factors alongside nourishing, moisturizing, and antibacterial components in a 10 mL volume per vial, formulated to strengthen hair follicle anchoring, stimulate hair cycle transition from telogen to anagen, and reduce scalp dryness and inflammation. The accompanying soothing moisturizer completes the post-treatment scalp care protocol.
protocol: Apply the ampoule directly onto a freshly cleansed scalp using a fine-tip applicator or mesotherapy injection (30G, 1-2 mm depth for injectable protocols), distributing evenly across the parting lines and thinning zones, then massage for 2-3 minutes. Follow with the soothing moisturizer to seal and calm the scalp. Perform 1-2 sessions per week for 8-12 weeks as an initial course.

description: CAMELLEX Camellia Exo No.5 is a dual-ampoule skin booster pairing 100 mg of plant-derived camellia exosomes per vial with a 6 mL solvent ampoule containing PDRN, collagen, and peptides alongside botanical extracts. Camellia-derived exosomes carry bioactive lipids and flavonoids that accelerate skin repair and renewal, while PDRN activates adenosine A2A receptors to promote fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis.
protocol: Reconstitute the exosome powder with the full 6 mL solvent ampoule and mix gently until fully dissolved without vigorous shaking. Administer via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm depth) or 30G mesotherapy injections (1-2 mm intradermal depth) across the target area. Recommend a series of 4-6 sessions at 2-4 week intervals; maintenance every 3-6 months.

description: LXC LACTO EXO COLLA combines 100 mg of Lactobacillus-derived exosomes per vial with a 6 mL PDRN and collagen peptide solvent to support skin regeneration, barrier repair, and elasticity improvement through complementary mechanisms. Lactobacillus exosomes modulate skin microbiome-associated inflammation and enhance ceramide production, while PDRN and plant stem cell extract synergistically drive collagen neosynthesis.
protocol: Reconstitute the exosome powder with the 6 mL PDRN + peptide solvent and mix gently until dissolved. Administer via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm depth) or 30G mesotherapy injections (1-2 mm intradermal) across the treatment zones. A standard course is 4-6 sessions at 2-4 week intervals; repeat the course 1-2 times annually for maintenance.

description: RXC RED EXO COLLA is a multi-source exosome skin booster combining exosomes derived from four botanicals (Panax ginseng, centella asiatica, camellia japonica, and carrot) with PDRN, collagen, peptides, glutathione, arbutin, tranexamic acid, and vitamin C. The comprehensive formula simultaneously targets skin regeneration, elasticity restoration, brightening, and hyperpigmentation reduction through parallel cellular pathways.
protocol: Reconstitute the 100 mg exosome powder with the 6 mL PDRN + peptide solvent, mixing gently until fully dissolved. Administer via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm) or 30G intradermal mesotherapy (1-2 mm depth) across the face and neck. A standard course of 4-6 sessions every 2-4 weeks is recommended; follow with sunscreen compliance post-treatment due to brightening actives.

description: SELASTIN TOX GF11 is an anti-wrinkle and brightening skin booster containing Syn-Ake (a synthetic tripeptide mimicking waglerin-1 for muscle relaxation), multiple growth factors (EGF, FGF, IGF), glutathione, arbutin, vitamins C/B2/B3/B12, and adenosine in a 5 mL ready-to-inject formulation. The Syn-Ake component inhibits nicotinic acetylcholine receptors at the neuromuscular junction, providing a non-botulinum wrinkle-relaxing effect alongside growth factor-driven collagen stimulation.
protocol: Administer the full 5 mL per session via 30G intradermal mesotherapy injections at 1-2 mm depth using a multi-puncture nappage technique across the face. Sessions are typically scheduled every 2-4 weeks for a course of 4-6 treatments. No reconstitution required; use the ready-to-inject vial immediately upon opening.

description: SELASTIN EXO PLUS is an exosome-based regenerative skin booster combining 100 mg of highly bioactive exosomes per vial with a 5 mL solvent containing PDRN, collagen, peptides, madecassoside, asiaticoside, phytosterol, glycoside, and tannin. Madecassoside and asiaticoside from centella asiatica reduce post-injection inflammation while supporting collagen type I and III synthesis alongside the exosome-mediated repair cascade.
protocol: Reconstitute the 100 mg exosome powder with the full 5 mL PDRN + collagen + peptide solvent and mix gently until dissolved. Administer via 30G mesotherapy injections at 1-2 mm intradermal depth or via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm). Recommend 4-6 sessions every 2-4 weeks; best tolerated with topical anaesthetic cream applied 30-45 minutes prior.

description: CURENEX SCULP is a poly-L-lactic acid (PLLA) collagen biostimulator supplied as 360 mg of sterile microparticle powder per vial. PLLA microparticles stimulate a controlled fibroplasia response, inducing neocollagenesis and gradual volumetric restoration in areas of facial volume loss, fine lines, and skin laxity over a period of weeks to months following injection.
protocol: Reconstitute the 360 mg PLLA powder in 5-8 mL of sterile water for injection or lidocaine solution, mixing vigorously for 2-3 minutes and allowing to hydrate for a minimum of 2 hours (or overnight) at room temperature before use. Inject intradermally to the deep dermis or subcutaneous plane using a 25-26G needle or cannula; avoid superficial injection. A series of 2-3 sessions at 4-6 week intervals is standard, with results developing progressively over 3-6 months.

description: CURENEX PDRN Multi is a multifaceted bio-revitalizing booster combining salmon-derived polydeoxyribonucleotide (PDRN) with multi-peptides, glutathione, collagen, and hyaluronic acid in a 5 mL injectable formulation. PDRN activates adenosine A2A receptors to upregulate VEGF expression, promote fibroblast proliferation, and accelerate tissue repair, while glutathione provides systemic antioxidant and brightening support.
protocol: Administer 1-5 mL per session via 30G intradermal mesotherapy injections at 1-2 mm depth across the face, neck, or targeted zones using a multi-puncture or linear threading technique. Standard courses consist of 4-6 sessions at 2-4 week intervals; maintenance injections every 2-3 months. No reconstitution required; use the ready-to-inject vial upon opening.

description: CURENEX Daily Care Skinbooster Serum is a topical daily serum featuring salmon DNA (PDRN-derived) as its signature nourishing active, formulated at a concentration designed for transdermal absorption to support cellular renewal, hydration balance, and oil regulation on the skin surface. The lightweight texture is designed for quick penetration without residue, suitable for use morning and evening before heavier skin care steps.
protocol: Dispense 3-4 drops or one pump onto cleansed skin morning and evening, then press the serum gently across the face and neck with clean palms. Allow 30-60 seconds for full absorption before layering moisturizer or sunscreen. Best used as part of a complete Curenex home-care routine following in-clinic PDRN booster sessions for enhanced results.

description: CURENEX Rejuvenating Cream is a nourishing topical cream formulated to condition, comfort, and support skin recovery during post-procedure care and daily home routines. The formulation provides a barrier-supportive and hydrating effect suited to skin in the healing phase following injectable or energy-based aesthetic treatments.
protocol: Apply an appropriate amount to cleansed skin morning and evening, massaging gently in upward motions across the face and neck until fully absorbed. During the post-procedure recovery period, apply as directed by the treating practitioner to support barrier repair and minimize transepidermal water loss. Avoid applying to open or ablated wound areas.

description: CURENEX Hydrating Cleanser is a gentle daily facial cleanser formulated with botanical extracts to remove impurities and makeup residue while maintaining skin hydration and comfort throughout the cleansing process. The mild surfactant base is designed to avoid stripping the acid mantle, leaving the skin balanced and calm after washing.
protocol: Dispense an appropriate amount onto damp skin, massage gently across the face in slow circular motions for 30-60 seconds to emulsify impurities, then rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water morning and evening. Avoid hot water, which can disrupt the skin barrier, and follow immediately with the Curenex toner or serum step.

description: CURENEX LIPO is a phosphatidylcholine (PPC)-based lipolytic injectable formulated for both facial and body fat reduction procedures. Phosphatidylcholine acts as a detergent on adipocyte cell membranes, causing lysis and subsequent removal of fatty acids via the lymphatic system, enabling targeted contouring of submental fat, jowls, localised body fat deposits, and lipomas.
protocol: Draw up the required volume from the 10 mL vial and administer via a 27-30G needle directly into the subcutaneous fat layer at 10-13 mm depth for body sites and 6-8 mm for facial applications, using a depot technique (0.1-0.2 mL per injection point) with points spaced 1 cm apart across the treatment zone. Typical sessions require 2-4 vials for body and 0.5-2 vials for facial use; schedule treatments 4-6 weeks apart for 2-4 sessions total.

description: CURENEX Rejuvenating Mask is a sheet-style treatment mask from the Curenex care line formulated to condition, refresh, and hydrate the skin with actives drawn from the Curenex biostimulator platform. Designed as a complementary home-care product for use between or after in-clinic Curenex booster sessions, the mask supports moisture retention and skin comfort during the recovery phase.
protocol: Apply the mask to freshly cleansed skin, smoothing it firmly to ensure full contact, and leave in place for 20-30 minutes as directed on the packaging. Remove and gently pat remaining essence into the skin using the ring fingers until absorbed. Use 2-3 times per week or after each in-clinic session during the post-procedure recovery window.

description: CURENEX Exo Brightening Cream is a lightweight daily moisturizer infused with exosomes, PDRN, vitamins, and peptides that together target uneven skin tone, dullness, and early signs of aging in a quick-absorbing, non-greasy formula. The exosome and PDRN complex provides cellular signalling for repair and renewal while vitamins and peptides deliver concurrent brightening, antioxidant, and firming benefits.
protocol: Apply a pea-to-pearl-sized amount to cleansed skin morning and evening, massaging gently in upward circular motions across the face and neck until fully absorbed. For optimal brightening efficacy, follow morning application with broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen. Ideal for use as part of a comprehensive Curenex home-care regimen between clinic sessions.

description: CURENEX Eye is a prefilled 2 mL periorbital skin booster containing 1% polynucleotide (PN) and 1% hyaluronic acid with lidocaine for patient comfort, formulated specifically for the delicate under-eye and periorbital region. PN supports fibroblast activation and extracellular matrix remodelling to reduce dark circles and hollowing, while HA provides immediate volumetric hydration and tissue smoothing for tear-trough and crow's feet improvement.
protocol: Administer the 2 mL syringe content via a 30G or 32G needle at 1-2 mm intradermal depth using a superficial multi-puncture technique in a grid pattern across the periorbital zone, taking particular care in the thin skin beneath the eye. Inject 0.01-0.02 mL per depot at points spaced 0.5-1 cm apart; lidocaine onset facilitates patient comfort. Recommend 3-4 sessions at 2-4 week intervals, with maintenance every 3-6 months.

description: CURENEX Snow Peel combines purified hydrolyzed sponge spicules in C-TOX powder form with a Snowpeel Activator containing salmon DNA (PDRN), glutathione, and gluconolactone (polyhydroxy acid) for a dual-action peel. The sponge spicule microstructure provides mechanical micro-channelling and exfoliation, while the activator delivers salmon DNA for cellular repair, glutathione for brightening, and gluconolactone for gentle chemical surface renewal without the aggressive downtime of traditional acid peels.
protocol: Mix one 1 g C-TOX powder vial with the Snowpeel Activator in the provided ratio and stir thoroughly until the powder is fully suspended. Apply to cleansed skin and massage gently in small circular motions for 2-5 minutes to activate micro-channelling, then leave the mask on for 10-15 minutes before rinsing with lukewarm water. A course of 4-6 sessions at 2-3 week intervals is recommended; follow each session with sunscreen and avoid active retinoids for 72 hours.

description: CURENEX Sheer Sunscreen delivers SPF50+ PA+++ broad-spectrum UV protection in a lightweight daily formula enriched with PDRN, peptides, and glutathione, combining reliable photoprotection with skin-conditioning and brightening actives. PDRN supports UV-induced DNA repair, glutathione provides antioxidant quenching of ROS generated by sun exposure, and the sheer finish is designed for comfortable daily wear without white cast.
protocol: Apply as the final morning skincare step, spreading a sufficient quantity (approximately 0.5 mL for face and neck) evenly across all exposed skin areas. Reapply every 2 hours during continuous outdoor exposure, after sweating, or after towelling. Particularly recommended as daily sun protection following PDRN injectable sessions and brightening treatments to prevent UV-triggered hyperpigmentation rebound.
